titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in Fayumic (fa22)
CM 3827
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project
Christian Askeland

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (Christian Askeland and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made.

sourceDesc.additional: Walter E. Crum, “review of Munier, Catalogue général du Musée du Caire: nos. 9201–9304, 1916,” Journal of Egyptian Archaeology 4, no. 1 (1917): 68; Henri Munier, Catalogue général des antiquités égyptiennes du Musée du Caire, manuscrits Coptes, nos. 9201–9304 (Caire: Institut français d’archéologie orientale, 1916), 44–46, inv. 9239, pl. 7. (Anne Boud’hors, “Réflexions supplémentaires sur les principaux témoins fayoumiques de la Bible,” in Coptica — Gnostica — Manichaica. Mélanges offerts à Wolf-Peter Funk, ed. Paul-Hubert Poirier and Louis Painchaud, Bibliothèque copte de Nag Hammadi, «Études» 7 (Louvain and Paris: Peeters, 2006), 85, fn. 15; Leo Depuydt, ed., Catalogue of Coptic manuscripts in the Pierpont Morgan Library. Louvain: Peeters, 1993, 617, fn. 4.)

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by Christian Askeland for the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John in 2011.

editorialDecl.p: This is a stub for an unreadable manuscript.
The XML specifications used were version 1.5 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Converted to XML specifications 1.5 by Hugh Houghton

ab.note: This manuscript is unreadable from current images. However, it contains John 4:33-35 in Greek and Fayumic
